name: Arsenal Audit
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>器</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>庫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>整</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>理</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>り</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send up to 2 Equip Spells with different names from your Deck to the GY. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster you control; equip it with up to 2 Equip Spells with different names from your hand and/or GY that can equip to it, but any battle damage it inflicts to your opponent is halved while equipped with a card by this effect. You can only use 1 "Arsenal Audit" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Send up to 2 Equip Spells with different names from your Deck to the GY. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster you control; equip it with up to 2 Equip Spells with different names from your hand and/or GY that can equip to it, but any battle damage it inflicts to your opponent is halved while equipped with a card by this effect. You can only use 1 "Arsenal Audit" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
